---
title: "Work"
description: "Professional projects across drug discovery, medical imaging, and infrastructure."
listing:
  contents: "projects/*.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [date, title, description, categories]
  categories: false
  include:
    categories: "Professional"
page-layout: article
---

::: {.eyebrow}
§ AstraZeneca · 2019 – present
:::

Drug discovery ML, medical imaging and segmentation, and the tooling and
infrastructure that supports both. Most recent work first.

For personal projects and side builds, see [Tinkering](experiments.qmd).
